case_title: WACHOVIA DEALER SERVICES, INC. VS. JOEANN BLANCO et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE - $55.00) SERVED MAR-20-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, PATRICK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2008 . BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WACHOVIA DEALER SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOEANN BLANCO, PATRICK $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, COSTS WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF. $1500 TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE JUNE 30, 2008; THEREAFTER PAYMENT OF $200 PER MONTH COMMENCING JULY 15, 2008, AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
